# Input and Output Port Attributes

**API Collection**

Attributes for input and output ports.

## Constants

- **QCPortAttributeTypeKey**: The key for the port type. The associated value can be of any of the following constants: [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCPortTypeBoolean], [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCPortTypeIndex], [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCPortTypeNumber], [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCPortTypeString], [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCPortTypeColor], [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCPortTypeImage], or [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCPortTypeStructure].
- **QCPortAttributeNameKey**: The key for the port name.
- **QCPortAttributeMinimumValueKey**: The key for the port minimum value.
- **QCPortAttributeMaximumValueKey**: The key for the port maximum value.
- **QCPortAttributeDefaultValueKey**: The key for the port default value. You can use this key only for value ports (Boolean, Index, Number, Color and String).
- **QCPortAttributeMenuItemsKey**: The key for the menu items.

## Constants

- **Patch Attributes**: Attributes for custom patches.
- **Port Input and Output Types**: Data types for input and output ports.
- **Pixel Formats**: Supported image pixel formats.
- **Execution Arguments**: Arguments to the method [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCPlugIn/execute(_:atTime:withArguments:)].
- **QCPlugInExecutionMode**: Execution modes for custom patches.
- **QCPlugInTimeMode**: Time modes for custom patches.
